title: Fix BaseTool.validateParams to throw Error subclasses
description: src/mcp/BaseTool.ts:107-111 and 136-140 throw plain object `{ code, message, data }`. Catchers in MCPServer.ts (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)) fall through to '[object Object]'. Fix: throw `new Error(message, { cause: data })` with a custom error class. Define a ValidationError extends Error. Update MCPServer catch blocks to use error.cause if present.
validation: Throw a tool with invalid params, confirm error message is preserved (not '[object Object]').
